Notice Of Motion Of Opposition To Defendant David Eugene Reisers Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Continued To May-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JUSTIN CHOU OF THE LAW OFFICES OF WALKUP & MELODIA, TEL. NO. 981-7210 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KEVIN K. CHOLAKIAN OF THE CHOLAKIAN & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (650) 871-9544 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT REISEN;
ATTY. DAVID A. DELBON, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3962 APPEARING FOR THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING A PENDING SETTLEMENT AMONG THE PARTIES. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion Of Opposition To Defendant David Eugene Reiser's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is continued to May 5, 2015 per the agreement of the parties.
